calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Settlment Payment Rights
Off Calendar Apr-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Matthew R. Eason, Esq., Eason & Tambornini, 916-438-1819, for petitioner and moving party Settlement Funding, LLC
John Q. Adams, respondent

RULING:
The Court held hearing for confirmation from defendant regarding the transfer of funds. Defendant indicated he fully understood the terms of the settlement transfer and his payment rights. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval of Transfer of Settlement Payment Rights is granted. Order signed. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
